comment_text.sn14.16:9.1: These verses appear in a similar context at Iti 78:6.1.

root_text.sn14.16:1.4: Atītampi kho, bhikkhave, addhānaṁ dhātusova sattā saṁsandiṁsu samiṁsu.
root_text.sn14.16:2.1: Anāgatampi kho, bhikkhave, addhānaṁ dhātusova sattā saṁsandissanti samessanti.
root_text.sn14.16:3.1: Etarahipi kho, bhikkhave, paccuppannaṁ addhānaṁ dhātusova sattā saṁsandanti samenti.
root_text.sn14.16:4.1: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, gūtho gūthena saṁsandati sameti;
root_text.sn14.16:4.6: evameva kho, bhikkhave, dhātusova sattā saṁsandanti samenti.
root_text.sn14.16:4.10: etarahipi kho paccuppannaṁ addhānaṁ dhātusova sattā saṁsandanti samenti.
root_text.sn14.16:5.3: Atītampi kho, bhikkhave, addhānaṁ dhātusova sattā saṁsandiṁsu samiṁsu.
root_text.sn14.16:6.2: etarahipi kho, bhikkhave, paccuppannaṁ addhānaṁ dhātusova sattā saṁsandanti samenti.
root_text.sn14.16:7.1: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, khīraṁ khīrena saṁsandati sameti;
root_text.sn14.16:7.6: evameva kho, bhikkhave, dhātusova sattā saṁsandanti samenti.
root_text.sn14.16:7.10: etarahipi kho paccuppannaṁ addhānaṁ dhātusova sattā saṁsandanti samenti.
root_text.sn14.16:8.2: Idaṁ vatvāna sugato athāparaṁ etadavoca satthā:

translation_text.sn14.16:1.2: “Mendicants, sentient beings join together and converge because of an element.
translation_text.sn14.16:1.3: Those who have inferior convictions join together and converge with those who have inferior convictions.
translation_text.sn14.16:3.1: At present, too, sentient beings join together and converge because of an element.
translation_text.sn14.16:3.2: Those who have inferior convictions join together and converge with those who have inferior convictions.
translation_text.sn14.16:4.1: It’s like how dung joins together with dung,
translation_text.sn14.16:4.6: In the same way, sentient beings join together and converge because of an element.
translation_text.sn14.16:4.7: Those who have inferior convictions join together and converge with those who have inferior convictions.
translation_text.sn14.16:4.10: At present, too, sentient beings join together and converge because of an element.
translation_text.sn14.16:4.11: Those who have inferior convictions join together and converge with those who have inferior convictions.
translation_text.sn14.16:5.1: Sentient beings join together and converge because of an element.
translation_text.sn14.16:5.2: Those who have good convictions join together and converge with those who have good convictions.
translation_text.sn14.16:6.2: At present, too, sentient beings join together and converge because of an element.
translation_text.sn14.16:6.3: Those who have good convictions join together and converge with those who have good convictions.
translation_text.sn14.16:7.1: It’s like how milk joins together with milk,
translation_text.sn14.16:7.6: In the same way, sentient beings join together and converge because of an element.
translation_text.sn14.16:7.7: Those who have good convictions join together and converge with those who have good convictions.
translation_text.sn14.16:7.10: At present, too, sentient beings join together and converge because of an element.
translation_text.sn14.16:7.11: Those who have good convictions join together and converge with those who have good convictions.”
translation_text.sn14.16:8.1: That is what the Buddha said.
translation_text.sn14.16:8.2: Then the Holy One, the Teacher, went on to say:
translation_text.sn14.16:9.2: they’re cut off by being aloof.
translation_text.sn14.16:9.3: If you’re lost in the middle of a great sea,
translation_text.sn14.16:9.4: and you clamber up on a little log, you’ll sink.
translation_text.sn14.16:10.1: So too, a person who lives well
translation_text.sn14.16:10.2: sinks by relying on a lazy person.
translation_text.sn14.16:10.4: a lazy person who lacks energy.
